properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v2 v8 v3 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Can't you feel the cold wings blowing Can't you see the storms Prophecies fulfilling Can't you see the time has come Can't you see hell is on the earth Can't you see the wars Continually evil Describes the heart of men Can't you see the nation are shaking So many already fall But we've received a Kingdom

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Any day now Any day now Any day now We'll be going home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Any day now Any day now Any day now We'll be gone forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The pale horse rider is riding Unto him power's given As hell follows death With destruction on their trail While the earth is groaning I'm birth pain to be delivered Awaiting full redemption And the manifested sons of God But the mighty Angel came down With his feet on sea and land And an open book in his hand.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Any day now (any day now) Any day now (any day now) Any day now We'll be going home (we'll be going home)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Any day now (any day now) Any day now (any day now) Any day now We'll be gone forever

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Can't you hear the trumpet sounding Can't you see it's time To be free from all our bondage And reclaim our inheritance Can't you see the bride is rising Can't you hear those seven thunders that will take us from this pest house to a body glorified Can't you see it's getting closer Can't you feel the pull inside very soon we will be raptured

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Any day now (the trumpets going to sound) Any day now (the death in Christ shall rise) Any day now (between six and nine, between six and nine) Any day now (our bodies will be changed) Any day now (in the twinkling of an eye) Any day now the lamb will take his bride
